underlying_goal: Build a signal analyzer dashboard page integrated into the existing Million backtest UI with histogram charts, data tables, filtering, and a chart navigator component
friction_detail: Claude built the entire frontend in the wrong repo (danxbot instead of Million/freqtrade), requiring a full revert and reimplementation.
brief_summary: User wanted a signal analyzer dashboard page in the Million backtest UI; Claude initially built it in the wrong repo but recovered and delivered a polished implementation with iterative UI refinements.
